name: Rahul S.
review: The QR entry system was so seamless! We didn't have to wait at all. The Cyclone Drop is absolutely insane — best ride I've been on!

name: Priya K.
review: Amazing water park! My daughter had so much fun in the Kids Coral Zone. The staff were super helpful and the park was clean.

name: Anon
review: Perfect for our corporate team outing. The staff managed everything brilliantly, the food was surprisingly good!
